title: Sugar-Bytes : What Turnado Can Do ! (in depth look)
description:
Dan-D Shows us a more in depth look at Sugar-Bytes' Turnado !

Need a store for D16 products? https://musicmarketing.ca/brand/D16-GROUP

#turnado #d16 #tutorial
transcript: hey guys welcome back to another episode of music marketing TV dandy and thanks for tuning in to part two of what tornado can do for your project in the previous video I showed you guys snippets of what tornado can do for your bass line or maybe some chords like you know piano chords or whatever I'm just going to go further into how I did that so here's a snippet again of the bass line this is original bass line along with some kicks of course right and I also have and that sound is just the baseline it may sound like other instruments in there but it's just a whole bunch of whenever this goes this this fader goes onto this section it will play whatever is along these lines right so it's yes it is like a sequencer as you can see as I go through here I have this guitar amp
